name: 4pk Entertaining Martini Cocktail Glass Set - Threshold™: Clear Glass, Dishwasher-Safe, 8oz Capacity, Set of 4
description:
Entertaining your guests at your next party with this 4-Piece Entertaining Martini Cocktail Glass Set from Threshold™. This set includes four transparent clear martini glasses with a capacity of 8 ounces for serving exquisite cocktails. Made of glass, they should be used with cold beverages only and can be tossed in the dishwasher after use for quick and easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
